trans-unit.source: Exercise 3: Visualising Health Infrastructure, Population and Measles Incidence in QGIS
trans-unit.target: Exercise 3: Visualising Health Infrastructure, Population and Measles Incidence in QGIS

trans-unit.source: Now that you have prepared and enriched your datasets in Exercises 1 and 2, it is time to create clear, visually compelling maps for decision-makers. These maps will help the Ministry of Health and partners understand:
trans-unit.target: Now that you have prepared and enriched your datasets in Exercises 1 and 2, it is time to create clear, visually compelling maps for decision-makers. These maps will help the Ministry of Health and partners understand:

trans-unit.source: Which health facilities have cold-chain capacity
trans-unit.target: Which health facilities have cold-chain capacity

trans-unit.source: Which districts have the highest measles incidence rate
trans-unit.target: Which districts have the highest measles incidence rate

trans-unit.source: In this exercise, you will create two publication-ready maps using the QGIS Print Layout Composer.
trans-unit.target: In this exercise, you will create two publication-ready maps using the QGIS Print Layout Composer.

trans-unit.source: By the end of this exercise, you will be able to:
trans-unit.target: By the end of this exercise, you will be able to:

trans-unit.source: Configure map symbology for clear visualisation
trans-unit.target: Configure map symbology for clear visualisation

trans-unit.source: Create two separate map layouts using the Print Layout
trans-unit.target: Create two separate map layouts using the Print Layout

trans-unit.source: Add essential map elements (title, legend, scale bar, north arrow, logos)
trans-unit.target: Add essential map elements (title, legend, scale bar, north arrow, logos)

trans-unit.source: Export maps as high-quality PDF or PNG outputs
trans-unit.target: Export maps as high-quality PDF or PNG outputs

trans-unit.source: Health facilities enriched with cold-chain and capacity info
trans-unit.target: Health facilities enriched with cold-chain and capacity info

trans-unit.source: Adm2 boundaries enriched with population & measles incidence
trans-unit.target: Adm2 boundaries enriched with population & measles incidence

trans-unit.source: Task 1: Visualise the Health Facilities Capacities
trans-unit.target: Task 1: Visualise the Health Facilities Capacities

trans-unit.source: Change the style from `Single Symbol` to `Categorized`.
trans-unit.target: Change the style from `Single Symbol` to `Categorized`.

trans-unit.source: Adjust the symbols (e.g., blue for “yes”, grey for “no”).
trans-unit.target: Adjust the symbols (e.g., blue for “yes”, grey for “no”).

trans-unit.source: Task 2: Prepare the Measles Incidence Layer
trans-unit.target: Task 2: Prepare the Measles Incidence Layer

trans-unit.source: Choose a sequential or red–yellow colour ramp.
trans-unit.target: Choose a sequential or red–yellow colour ramp.

trans-unit.source: Task 3: Create a Map in the Print Layout Composer
trans-unit.target: Task 3: Create a Map in the Print Layout Composer

trans-unit.source: The print layout composer is a separate QGIS window where you can design a printable or publishable map by adding map canvases, legend items, text boxes, attribute tables, etc. to create a finished map product.
trans-unit.target: The print layout composer is a separate QGIS window where you can design a printable or publishable map by adding map canvases, legend items, text boxes, attribute tables, etc. to create a finished map product.

trans-unit.source: First, we need to create a new print layout:
trans-unit.target: First, we need to create a new print layout:

trans-unit.source: A new window will open, this is the [print layout composer](https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Module_4/en_qgis_map_design_2.html). Take the time to [understand the interface and the different tools](https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Module_4/en_qgis_understanding_print_layout.html).
trans-unit.target: A new window will open, this is the [print layout composer](https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Module_4/en_qgis_map_design_2.html). Take the time to [understand the interface and the different tools](https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Module_4/en_qgis_understanding_print_layout.html).

trans-unit.source: Select `Add Map` ![](/fig/30.30.2_print_layout_insert_map_icon.png) from the toolbar on the left.
trans-unit.target: Select `Add Map` ![](/fig/30.30.2_print_layout_insert_map_icon.png) from the toolbar on the left.

trans-unit.source: Draw a rectangle on the blank page canvas.
trans-unit.target: Draw a rectangle on the blank page canvas.

trans-unit.source: Adjust the extent (pan and zoom) using the `Move item content` ![](/fig/30.30.2_print_layout_move_content_icon.png).
trans-unit.target: Adjust the extent (pan and zoom) using the `Move item content` ![](/fig/30.30.2_print_layout_move_content_icon.png).
